worker_a.role: Creates the landing page, shared stylesheet, Snake game, and validation script
constraints: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS only, no frameworks or libraries
index.html must link main.css and all game JS files via script tags
Snake game must be fully playable with arrow keys and include scoring
validate_site.js must use only Node built-ins, no npm packages
validate_site.js must write results to site_validation_output.txt and set exit code

worker_b.role: Creates the Tic Tac Toe and Memory Match game scripts
constraints: Vanilla JavaScript only, no frameworks or libraries
Each game must expose an init function on the window object
Tic Tac Toe must support two-player local mode with win/draw detection
Memory Match must have card-flip mechanic and a win condition
Games must render inside a container element passed by ID
